title: Get-PipelineItems returns items without 'type' property
description: Pipeline items stored in JSON lists (featureRequests, bugs, items2ADD, bugs2FIX, todos) do not carry a 'type' field. Get-PipelineItems collected them without injecting type, causing downstream consumers like Get-CentralMasterToDo and Export-CentralMasterToDo to crash with 'The property type cannot be found on this object'.
rootCause: Items are segregated by list name in the registry JSON but the list-to-type mapping was not applied during collection.
resolution: Added listTypeMap hashtable in Get-PipelineItems to inject type property via Add-Member based on which list each item came from.
preventionRule: When items are stored in typed lists, always inject the type property when reading items back into a flat collection.
